label: Israelíes Muertos (7 Oct)
contestNote: Initial reports cited ~1,400; revised to ~1,195 after removing duplicate foreign national counts
delta: Deadliest day for Jews since the Holocaust

label: Rehenes Llevados a Gaza
source: Israeli Government / Hostages and Missing Families Forum
deltaNote: ~133 released or rescued through deals and operations; ~38 confirmed deceased

label: Cohetes Disparados (Barrage del 7 Oct)
deltaNote: Largest single barrage in Israel's history; overwhelmed Iron Dome in south

label: Combatientes de Hamas Infiltrados en Israel
contestNote: Estimates range from 2,500 to 3,500; IDF figure most widely cited

label: Comunidades y Bases Atacadas
deltaNote: Gaza Envelope (Otef Aza) communities within 7 km of Gaza border

label: Soldados de las FDI Muertos (7 Oct)
delta: Included in total civilian+military figure of 1,195
deltaNote: Soldiers killed at overrun bases, checkpoints, and during counterattacks throughout Oct 7

label: Puntos de Brecha en la Valla de Gaza
deltaNote: Bulldozers, explosives, and paragliders used; fence breached simultaneously along 65 km stretch

label: Ciudadanos Extranjeros Muertos
deltaNote: Largest single-day loss of American lives since 9/11 (33 Americans); also Thai, German, French, British nationals
